sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, text String);
UPDATE test_strings SET text = appendTrailingCharIfAbsent(text, '!') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, appendTrailingCharIfAbsent(text, '.') AS modified_text FROM test_strings;
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, text) VALUES (3, appendTrailingCharIfAbsent('Clickhouse', ' '));
